accept: Split into two predicates: isReadyCandidate (status==open) for the ready-set filter, isActive (status!=closed) for the blocker check.
act ready never returns issues with status=in_progress or status=blocked.
Tests cover: (1) in_progress issue not surfaced; (2) blocked issue not surfaced; (3) open issue with in_progress blocker is correctly hidden; (4) open issue with closed blocker is correctly surfaced.
payload.description: Found by code reviewer 2026-05-10 at internal/cli/ready.go:127-135. The isActive predicate is shared between (a) 'is this a candidate for the ready set' and (b) 'is this dep currently blocking'. (a) needs status==open; (b) needs status!=closed. Code uses (b) for both, so in_progress and blocked issues appear in act ready. Agents will see already-claimed issues, attempt to claim, and burn time in losing claim races. Spec spec-v2.md §act ready line 726 explicitly: 'an issue is ready iff status == open AND no incoming blocks dep points at it from an open/in_progress issue.'
payload.title: act ready returns in_progress and blocked issues; spec says only open
